translations.en: a handsome, carefree gypsy man.
translations.zh: 英俊瀟灑、無憂無慮的吉普賽男子。

translations.en: "Hey, foxy! I bet you'd like me to unsheathe my weapon so you can have a look..."
translations.zh: 「嘿，美人！我敢說你想讓我拔出武器讓你瞧瞧……」
translations.note: 調情語，foxy=有吸引力（對女性玩家）

translations.en: "Hey there! Welcome to our humble caravan!"
translations.zh: 「嘿！歡迎來到我們的吉普賽篷車！」

translations.en: "You look like a bold warrior - would you like to spar a bit for practice?"
translations.zh: 「你看起來是個大膽的武士——想切磋練習一下嗎？」

translations.en: "Ah, I see you couldn't stay away... I have that effect on women."
translations.zh: 「啊，看來你難以抗拒……我對女人向來有這種魔力。」

translations.en: "Welcome back, $P. Came for some more of our gypsy hospitality, I see!"
translations.zh: 「歡迎回來，$P。看來是來享受更多吉普賽款待的！」

translations.en: "I am Andreas, prince of the @gypsies."
translations.zh: 「我是安德烈亞斯，@吉普賽人的王子。」

translations.en: "I live the carefree life of a @gypsy, traveling hither and yon."
translations.zh: 「我過著自由自在的@吉普賽生活，走遍四方。」

translations.en: "We all have our @talents. I myself happen to have two."
translations.zh: 「我們都有各自的@才能。我剛好有兩項。」

translations.en: "I'd be glad to show you sometime!"
translations.zh: 「我很樂意找個時候讓你見識！」

translations.en: "What, you mean @swordplay? Just ask, and I'll give thee a @lesson you won't forget!"
translations.zh: 「什麼，你說@劍術？只管開口，我給汝一堂汝不會忘記的@課！」

translations.en: "She practices the world's oldest @profession. I, of course, have perfected it, and thus need no practice."
translations.zh: 「她從事世界上最古老的@職業。而我，當然，已臻完美，無需再練習。」

translations.en: "He's my dad - the king of the gypsies!"
translations.zh: 「他是我爸——吉普賽人之王！」

translations.en: "A map? Aye, @Arturos has some scrap like that. I know nothing more of it."
translations.zh: 「地圖？是啊，@阿圖羅斯有那樣的廢紙。我對此一無所知。」

translations.en: "Would you like to spar a bit?"
translations.zh: 「想切磋一下嗎？」

translations.en: "Come again soon."
translations.zh: 「快快再來。」

translations.en: "I hope we get better acquainted when next we meet."
translations.zh: 「希望下次相遇時我們能更加熟識。」

translations.en: "I like your clothes, but I think you'd look better without them..."
translations.zh: 「我喜歡你的衣著，但我覺得沒穿的話你會更好看……」

translations.en: "May your travels prove interesting."
translations.zh: 「願你的旅途精彩有趣。」

translations.en: "Oho, so that's what you're after, you naughty
translations.zh: 「哦哈，原來你是衝著這個來的，你這個壞

translations.en: girl
translations.zh: 丫頭

translations.en: boy
translations.zh: 小子

translations.en: "For a mere 10 gold pieces, I'll transport you to the heights of ecstasy. Will it be yea or nay?"
translations.zh: 「只需區區10枚金幣，我將帶你登上極樂之巔。是允還是拒？」

translations.en: "Well... Normally I'm more of a ladies' man. But I guess your money is as good as anyone else's. It'll cost you 10 gold, okay?"
translations.zh: 「嗯……我通常更喜歡女人。但你的錢和別人一樣好用。10枚金幣，好嗎？」

translations.en: A voice in the back of your head asks, "Do you really have time for this?"
translations.zh: 腦後有個聲音問道：「你真的有時間做這個嗎？」

translations.en: $Y interrupts. "`$G, I really doubt we have time for this..."
translations.zh: $Y插嘴道：「$G，我真的懷疑我們有沒有時間做這個……」

translations.en: "Don't trouble yourself about that. The art of the @sword and the art of @love are all that really matter."
translations.zh: 「別為此煩惱。@劍術之道與@愛情之道，才是真正重要的事。」

translations.en: "Naturally, when so lovely a lady as yourself comes along, I offer, shall we say, my @services."
translations.zh: 「自然，當如汝這般可人的女子出現，我便提供，姑且稱之為，我的@服務。」

translations.en: "When the opportunity arises, I do what I can to brighten the lives of the ladies."
translations.zh: 「每當機會出現，我盡力為女士們的生活帶來光彩。」

translations.en: "I'll just bet he does!"
translations.zh: 「我就知道他是這種人！」

translations.en: "Of course, you'd probably be more interested in my sister @Wanda, right?"
translations.zh: 「當然，你大概對我妹妹@汪達更感興趣吧，對嗎？」

translations.en: "Can't say I blame you. In fact, if she wasn't my sister..."
translations.zh: 「我不怪你。說真的，如果她不是我妹妹……」

translations.en: "Hmm, wouldn't have figured you for the type..."
translations.zh: 「嗯，沒想到你是這種人……」

translations.en: "Well, come on. Yea or nay, $G?"
translations.zh: 「好吧，怎樣。允還是拒，$G？」

translations.en: "As you like. But take my advice--you should live a little now."
translations.zh: 「隨你。但聽我一句——你應該及時行樂。」

translations.en: "That way, you'll have something to remember when you're old and gray..."
translations.zh: 「這樣，等你白髮蒼蒼時，才有些可回味的事……」

translations.en: "Hey, you don't have the money! I don't take charity cases."
translations.zh: 「嘿，你沒錢！我不做慈善。」

translations.en: The gypsy leads you into a nearby wagon...
translations.zh: 那吉普賽人帶你進入附近的篷車……

translations.en: After a while, you and he wander back to the rest of the caravan, weary but satisfied.
translations.zh: 過了一會兒，你們漫步回到篷車隊，疲憊但滿足。

translations.en: You try to ignore the nagging voice in the back of your head that says you shouldn't have wasted time like that.
translations.zh: 你試圖無視腦後那個念念叨叨說你不該這樣浪費時間的聲音。

translations.en: $Y scowls. "Well, you've certainly picked a fine one to be carrying on with."
translations.zh: $Y皺起眉頭。「好吧，你確實找了個好對象鬼混。」

translations.en: "I would remind you that Britannia is under invasion by hordes of gargoyles, but I'd hate to spoil your fun..."
translations.zh: 「我想提醒你不列顛尼亞正遭魔像族大舉入侵，但我不想掃你的興……」

translations.en: $N laughs. "'Tis not a crime to give yourself over to pleasure..."
translations.zh: $N笑道：「沉溺於歡愉並非罪過……」

translations.en: "Maybe some other time."
translations.zh: 「也許改日吧。」

translations.en: Pulling a couple of sticks from his belt, the gypsy hands you one. You fight with them as if they were swords for a while.
translations.zh: 那吉普賽人從腰帶拔出兩根短棍，遞給你一根。你們用它們像劍一樣切磋了一會兒。

translations.en: After you're finished, he comes over and puts his arm around your shoulder as he gives you a few pointers on fencing style.
translations.zh: 結束後，他走過來把手搭在你肩上，給你提了幾點劍法建議。

translations.en: You're not sure, but you think perhaps you felt a slight tug at the pouch you keep your coins in.
translations.zh: 你不確定，但你覺得似乎感受到裝錢的袋子被輕輕拉了一下。

translations.en: "Ah yes, you've heard of the silver tablet!"
translations.zh: 「啊是的，你聽說過那塊銀板！」

translations.en: "I haven't got it myself, but I can tell you where it is for a price... Shall we say 7 gold pieces?"
translations.zh: 「我自己沒有，但我可以告訴你它在哪裡，當然要收費……就說7枚金幣吧？」

translations.en: "Suit yourself."
translations.zh: 「隨你便。」

translations.en: "Come back when you have the money."
translations.zh: 「等你有錢了再來。」

translations.en: "I overheard a bard in a tavern say that it was somewhere on the Isle of the Avatar."
translations.zh: 「我在酒館偷聽到一個吟遊詩人說它在聖者之島上某處。」

translations.en: "Perhaps @Arturos could tell you precisely."
translations.zh: 「也許@阿圖羅斯能告訴你確切地點。」

translations.en: "Wouldn't you like to be a gypsy too?"
translations.zh: 「你不想也成為吉普賽人嗎？」

translations.en: "The more fool you!"
translations.zh: 「那你真是個大傻瓜！」

translations.en: "You have the carefree spirit, but alas, one must be born a gypsy."
translations.zh: 「你有那種無憂無慮的靈魂，可惜吉普賽人是天生的。」

translations.en: "A fine thing to dream of! But one such as you could never be a gypsy."
translations.zh: 「美好的夢想！但像你這樣的人永遠成不了吉普賽人。」

translations.en: "My mind is willing, but the flesh is weak..."
translations.zh: 「心有餘而力不足……」

translations.en: "Come back later, when I've had some time to rest."
translations.zh: 「晚點再來，等我休息過後。」

translator_notes: 安德烈亞斯是吉普賽花花公子，提供成人服務。對男女玩家各有不同台詞。口語化，帶調情意味。涉及劍術練習和偷竊暗示。
